description: Remove edit/delete buttons from riwayat tab (view only) and change pemeriksaOleh to always be 'TENAGA MEDIS IJEF'.
steps: In showTestKesehatanTab(), for tab === 'riwayat', only render the view button (detailTestKesehatan) - remove edit and delete buttons
In simpanTestKesehatan(), change kesimpulan.pemeriksaOleh from currentUser.nama to the hardcoded string 'TENAGA MEDIS IJEF'
acceptance_criteria: In the riwayat tab, only the view (eye icon) button is shown - no edit or delete buttons
In the calon and existing tabs, all buttons remain as before
kesimpulan.pemeriksaOleh is always set to 'TENAGA MEDIS IJEF'
verification: Grep for 'TENAGA MEDIS IJEF' in the file
Verify riwayat tab conditional logic in showTestKesehatanTab
